title: Large XP Bottles
description: Adds Large XP Bottles, which contain more XP than a regular XP Bottle while still maintaining balanced gameplay.
body:
This datapack can also be found here on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/large-xp-bottles/), although the Modrinth version will be updated more frequently.

# Warnings and Announcements

### Do not use the Crafter to craft this custom item.﻿ (In the datapack version only, this is because of issues with the crafting system.)

### All known Fabric bugs have been fixed. More versions will be released in the future!

# How to make it

Craft 9 XP Bottles (Bottle o' Enchanting) to make 1 Large XP Bottle. This can be used to help store XP and to repair items faster.

# Statistics and Conversions
## Here are the calculations for different amounts of both types of XP Bottles:

### Large
1 Large XP Bottle -> 50 XP, or 4 Levels and 10 Points

64 Large XP Bottles -> 3200 XP, or 41 Levels and 78 Points

### Vanilla
1 XP Bottle -> 3 - 11 XP (Average 7), or 0 Levels and 3 Points - 1 Level and 4 Points (Average 1 Level)

9 XP Bottles, equal to 1 Large XP Bottle -> 27 - 99 (Average 63) XP, or 3 Levels - 7 Levels and 8 Points (Average 5 Levels and 8 Points)

64 XP Bottles -> 192 - 704 XP (Average 448), or 11 Levels and 5 Points - 22 Levels and 25 Points (Average 18 Levels and 7 points)

From testing, I have found that you can fully repair a broken Mending Netherite Chestplate (592 Durability) with just 6 Large XP Bottles (300 XP). Each Large XP Bottle restores 100 Durability to a random armor piece.
